recent_trades.summary: Trimming UNH as Berkshire Hathaway's complete exit creates meaningful overhang, reducing weight from 5.1% to ~3.5%.

market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P -0.69%, Nasdaq -1.05%, Dow -0.35%. Healthcare led sectors (+1.64%) while Materials lagged (-2.22%). Gemini 3.1 Pro led the day at +0.65%. 3 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +22.32%. Key headline: China’s Economy Slows Sharply as Investment Resumes Declines - Bloomberg.com — market reaction muted.
